options.name: --version
options.description: This is the only conventional command line argument that Taskwarrior supports, and is intended for add-on scripts to verify the version number of an installed Taskwarrior without invoking the mechanisms that create default files

subcommands.name: active
subcommands.description: Shows all tasks matching the filter, that are started but not completed

subcommands.name: all
subcommands.description: Shows all tasks matching the filter, including parents of recurring tasks

subcommands.name: blocked
subcommands.description: Shows all tasks matching the filter, that are currently blocked by other tasks

subcommands.name: blocking
subcommands.description: Shows all tasks matching the filter, that block other tasks

subcommands.name: burndown.daily
subcommands.description: Shows a graphical burndown chart, by day. Is affected by the context

subcommands.name: burndown.weekly
subcommands.description: Shows a graphical burndown chart, by week.  Note that 'burndown' is an alias to the 'burndown.weekly' report. Is affected by the context

subcommands.name: burndown.monthly
subcommands.description: Shows a graphical burndown chart, by month. Is affected by the context

subcommands.name: calendar
subcommands.description: Shows a monthly calendar with due tasks marked

subcommands.name: commands
subcommands.description: Shows all the supported commands, with some details of each

subcommands.name: diagnostics
subcommands.description: Shows diagnostic information, of the kind needed when reporting a problem

subcommands.name: logo
subcommands.description: Displays the Taskwarrior logo

subcommands.name: news
subcommands.description: Guides the user through important release notes anytime a new version of Taskwarrior is installed

subcommands.name: reports
subcommands.description: Lists all supported reports

subcommands.name: completed
subcommands.description: Shows all tasks matching the filter that are completed

subcommands.name: count
subcommands.description: Display only a count of tasks matching the filter. Is affected by the context

subcommands.name: export
subcommands.description: Exports all tasks in the JSON format matching the filter

subcommands.name: ghistory.annual
subcommands.description: Shows a graphical report of task status by year

subcommands.name: ghistory.monthly
subcommands.description: Shows a graphical report of task status by month

subcommands.name: ghistory.weekly
subcommands.description: Shows a graphical report of task status by week

subcommands.name: ghistory.daily
subcommands.description: Shows a graphical report of task status by day

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Shows the long usage text

subcommands.name: history.annual
subcommands.description: Shows a report of task history by year

subcommands.name: history.monthly
subcommands.description: Shows a report of task history by month

subcommands.name: history.weekly
subcommands.description: Shows a report of task history by week

subcommands.name: history.daily
subcommands.description: Shows a report of task history by day

subcommands.name: ids
subcommands.description: Applies the filter then extracts only the task IDs and presents them as a space-separated list

subcommands.name: uuids
subcommands.description: Applies the filter on all tasks (even deleted and completed tasks) then extracts only the task UUIDs and presents them as a space-separated list

subcommands.name: udas
subcommands.description: Shows a list of UDAs that are defined, including their name, type, label, and allowed values

subcommands.name: information
subcommands.description: Shows all data and metadata for the specified tasks

subcommands.name: long
subcommands.description: Provides the most detailed listing of tasks matching the filter

subcommands.name: ls
subcommands.description: Provides a short listing of tasks matching the filter

subcommands.name: minimal
subcommands.description: Provides a minimal listing of tasks matching the filter

subcommands.name: newest
subcommands.description: Shows the newest tasks matching the filter

subcommands.name: next
subcommands.description: Shows a page of the most urgent tasks, sorted by urgency, which is a calculated value

subcommands.name: ready
subcommands.description: Shows a page of the most urgent ready tasks, sorted by urgency with started tasks first

subcommands.name: oldest
subcommands.description: Shows the oldest tasks matching the filter

subcommands.name: overdue
subcommands.description: Shows all incomplete tasks matching the filter that are beyond their due date

subcommands.name: projects
subcommands.description: Lists all project names that are current used by pending tasks, and the number of tasks for each

subcommands.name: recurring
subcommands.description: Shows all recurring tasks matching the filter

subcommands.name: unblocked
subcommands.description: Shows all tasks that are not currently blocked by other tasks, matching the filter

subcommands.name: waiting
subcommands.description: Shows all waiting tasks matching the filter

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Adds a new pending task to the task list

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: annotate
subcommands.description: Adds an annotation to an existing task

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: append
subcommands.description: Appends description text to an existing task

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

name: delete
rm
subcommands.description: Deletes the specified task from the task list

subcommands.name: denotate
subcommands.description: Deletes an annotation for the specified task

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: done
subcommands.description: Marks the specified task as done

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: duplicate
subcommands.description: Duplicates the specified task and allows modifications

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: edit
subcommands.description: Launches a text editor to let you modify all aspects of a task directly

subcommands.name: log
subcommands.description: Adds a new task that is already completed, to the task list

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: modify
subcommands.description: Modifies the existing task with provided information

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: prepend
subcommands.description: Prepends description text to and existing task

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: purge
subcommands.description: Permanently removes the specified tasks from the data files

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.description: Marks the specified tasks as started

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: stop
subcommands.description: Removes the start time from the specified task

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: context
subcommands.description: Sets the currently active context

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Deletes the context with the name

subcommands.name: define
subcommands.description: Defines a new context with the name and definition filter

args.name: mods
args.description: Changes to apply to the selected tasks

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Outputs a list of available contexts along with their definitions

subcommands.name: none
subcommands.description: Clears the currently active context, if any was set

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Shows the currently active context, along with its definition

subcommands.name: stats
subcommands.description: Shows statistics of the tasks defined by the filter

subcommands.name: summary
subcommands.description: Shows a report of aggregated task status by project

subcommands.name: tags
subcommands.description: Show a list of all tags used

subcommands.name: timesheet
subcommands.description: Shows a weekly report of tasks completed and started

subcommands.name: undo
subcommands.description: Reverts the most recent action

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Shows the Taskwarrior version number
